hero.headline: The gutter guy Greenville calls *when it counts*
hero.subheadline: Max and his crew show up, get it right, and charge what they quote. No surprises.

services_section.label: GUTTER SOLUTIONS
services_section.heading: From install to repair — we handle it all
services_section.subheading: One call covers everything your gutters need

services.title: Gutter Installation
services.description: New seamless gutters sized right for your home. Custom cut on-site for perfect fit.

services.title: Gutter Repair
services.description: Storm damage, loose connections, leaks — we fix what's broken instead of selling you new.

services.title: Gutter Cleaning
services.description: Clear out leaves and debris so water flows where it should. Regular maintenance prevents bigger problems.

services.title: Downspout Service
services.description: Proper drainage away from your foundation. Reconnections, extensions, and replacements.

about.heading: Max and the First Choice team
about.body: We're the Greenville gutter crew that answers the phone and shows up when we say we will. Real quotes, honest work, fair pricing.

reviews.name: Derrick P.
reviews.text: Max is professional, dependable, and affordable. Outstanding work and the new gutters look beautiful.

reviews.name: Craig G.
reviews.text: Fair quote, great communication, and quality work. Will definitely use him for future gutter needs.

reviews.name: Kevin K.
reviews.text: Quick response and highly recommend their services. Had storm damage repaired perfectly.

service_areas.label: WHERE WE WORK
service_areas.heading: Serving the greater Greenville area
service_areas.subheading: Local gutter services throughout the Upstate

cta.heading: Ready to get your gutters handled right?
cta.body: Max will come take a look and give you a straight quote. No pressure, no games — just honest pricing on quality work.
